_README: User-editable pulse-streamer configuration -- the SINGLE source of truth for the
reconfigurable, compile-affecting hardware specifics.  The Python host (capacity
estimate, program validation, AXI runtime defaults) and the resource estimator read
this file; edit it to match your synthesized bitstream and FPGA part, then double-click
estimate_resources.bat in the repo root to check the part has enough resources.
IMPORTANT: 'params' below MUST match the localparams the bitstream was built with
(fpga/pulse_streamer/zlc_pulse_streamer_top.v).  If you rebuild the RTL with different
geometry (more edges, deeper delay, etc.), change BOTH the .v parameters and this file.
channel_count is normally INFERRED from the board XDC (fpga/board_config/board.xdc);
the value here is only the offline/fallback default.
